title: uTimber
description: Knock down whole tree with breaking one log.
body:
Simple timber / tree chopper plugin.

Break one log and whole tree comes down with a great animation.

# Features
- Every tree is configurable.
- Crouch(shift) to disable.
- Required tools (any item, default: axes).
- Optimized tree detection NO LAG.
- Sapling replant.

# Video
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/BeVHaWnHTkY?si=ZR_oUIVAkdMwo_gR" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

# VERSION
This plugin should work from 1.16 to the latest version of minecraft.

# Example config.yml
```yml
crouch_disable: true
tree_falling_damage: true
damage_tool_by_log_count: false
require_tool: true
tools:
  - WOODEN_AXE
  - STONE_AXE
  - COPPER_AXE
  - IRON_AXE
  - GOLDEN_AXE
  - DIAMOND_AXE
  - NETHERITE_AXE

replant_sapling: true
replantable_blocks:
  - dirt
  - grass_block

tree:
  oak:
    logs:
      - OAK_LOG
      - STRIPPED_OAK_LOG
    leaves:
      - OAK_LEAVES
    sapling: OAK_SAPLING
    log_distance_x: 0
    log_distance_y: 6
    large_log: false
    leaf_distance_x: 2
    leaf_distance_y: 4
    min_logs: 4
    min_leaves: 12
    separate_leaves: false
    diagonal_leaves: false
  #other trees...
```

# NOTE
Heavily inspired from the plugin UltimateTimber by Songoda.
I've made this plugin because theirs must be updated every version and they don't do it fast.
